headline_seed: Trump-backed candidates, 2020 election deniers, win Arizona primaries - NPR
draft_text:
Andy Biggs, Trump-backed former Freedom Caucus chair, won Arizona's GOP governor primary and faces incumbent Katie Hobbs in November. NPR and NBC News report Cook shifted the race to lean Democrat. Hobbs won 2022 by under 1 point.

And that's the mews.
